title: muiriantha hassellii
intro: Muiriantha hassellii is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Queensland and New South Wales in Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Muiriantha hassellii has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and efficacy should be verified by a healthcare professional.
